_comment: ElementMoveTool combined T → R → S chain (Stage 14.5 + 14.10). Picked centre on the +X+Y+Z corner, radius 0.5; falloff weight = 1 at the corner and 0 elsewhere. TX=0.3 + SX=2.0 in one apply. Pivot ALWAYS = falloff.pickedCenter when ElementMoveTool is active (Stage 14.10 — matches MODO ACEN.Element where the gizmo follows the picked element). Per-vert weights snapshotted at the baseline positions — matches MODO's xfrm.transform single-weight semantic. Corner with baseline-weight 1: TX gives (0.5+0.3, 0.5, 0.5); then SX=2 around pivot (0.5, 0.5, 0.5) with the SAME weight 1 gives x = 0.5 + (0.8 − 0.5) · 2 = 1.1.
